Position 27: G (gray bar)
Position 28: N

Position 31: N
Position 32: r (red dot)
Position 33: N
Wait, that doesn't match the segmentation which said the box had 14 N pixels with boundary [[9, 28], [9, 32], [11, 32], [11, 28]]. A 3x5 rectangle would have 15 cells, minus 1 for the red dot = 14 N pixels. So the red dot was at [10, 31] based on the initial segmentation.
Let me re-read the initial ASCII:
Row 9: BBBGNNNNNBBBB (G at 27, N at 28-32)
Row 10: BBBGNNNNrNBBBB (G at 27, N at 28-30, r at 31, N at 32)
Row 11: BBBGNNNNNBBBB (G at 27, N at 28-32)
So the box was:
```
NNNNN
NNNNr
NNNNN
```
That's 14 N pixels + 1 r pixel.
After clicking at [10, 29], the box became:
```
NN
rN
NN
```
That's 5 N pixels + 1 r pixel. The red dot moved from [10, 31] to [10, 28].
So the click at [10, 29] (which was an N pixel) caused the box to shrink from a 3x5 to a 3x2, and the red dot moved to [10, 28].
Now, the yellow bar is 8x3 (rows 28-35, cols 9-11), with the red dot at [34, 10]. Clicking on yellow pixels hasn't changed it.
What's different about the green box vs. the yellow bar? 
1. The green box is 3 rows tall, the yellow bar is 8 rows tall.
2. The green box has a gray bar on the LEFT (col 27), the yellow bar has a gray bar on the TOP (row 27).
3. The green box is horizontal (wider than tall), the yellow bar is vertical (taller than wide).
Maybe the mechanic only works on horizontal bars (3 rows tall)? Or maybe the green box was already "activated" by some previous action that I didn't notice?

Actually, the initial seeded frame had the green box at 14 pixels (as I confirmed by checking history[0].frame). Then I took actions, and at some point the box changed to 5 pixels. The first action that changed the box was MOUSE(row=10, col=29).
Hmm, but I also tried clicking at [10, 30] earlier (which was a black cell after the box shrank), and that didn't change anything.
OK let me think about this differently. Maybe the game isn't about clicking on the bars at all. Maybe the game is about clicking on the RED CROSSES or the U-SHAPES.
Let me try clicking on one of the green U-shapes. The left U-shape is at rows 20-22, cols 38-40. Let me click at [21, 38] (the middle-left pixel of the U-shape).

Wait, actually, I just realized something. Maybe the game is about clicking on the GRAY BORDER of the containers. The green U-shapes container has a gray border. Let me try clicking on the gray border at [20, 36] (the left edge of the container).
